rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §39.0237 governs prekindergarten assessment instruments and has no relation to property tax exemptions.
quote: Performance on an assessment instrument administered to students in prekindergarten may not be considered for any purpose under this chapter or Chapter 39A.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this education assessment statute.
